dataset: Palomar LFC Sample CCD Calibration Frames

pi_items.metadata_value: Palomar 200-inch Hale Telescope, Large Format Camera (LFC)
pi_items.verified_value: Palomar 200-inch Hale Telescope, Large Format Camera (LFC), Chip 0
pi_items.source: Zenodo record 3254683 title: 'Sample raw images from cryogenically cooled Large Field Camera chip 0 at Palomar Observatory'; Caltech Palomar Observatory documentation confirms LFC (Large Format Camera) mounted at Hale Telescope prime focus; authors: Erik Tollerud and Matthew Craig
Direct verification of Zenodo record 3254683; record publicly accessible with downloadable archive file 'example-cryo-LFC.tar.bz2' (161.6 MB)

pi_items.metadata_value: Cryo-cooled CCD frames from the Astropy CCD Reduction Guide dataset
pi_items.verified_value: Bias, dark, flat and science images from chip 0 of the cryogenically cooled Large Format Camera at Palomar Observatory. Published as Example 1 in the official Astropy CCD Data Reduction Guide.
pi_items.source: Zenodo record metadata; Astropy CCD Reduction Guide (astropy.org/ccd-reduction-and-photometry-guide/) lists this as primary Example 1 dataset with DOI 10.5281/zenodo.3254683; CCDs are cooled with liquid nitrogen resulting in negligible dark current

pi_items.verified_value: Real astronomical data from actual Palomar Observatory observations
pi_items.source: Data published by original observers (Erik Tollerud, Space Telescope Science Institute; Matthew Craig, Minnesota State University Moorhead) on Zenodo in June 2019 under CC-BY-4.0 license

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real astronomical CCD calibration frames from Palomar 200-inch Hale Telescope's Large Format Camera (LFC), Chip 0. Published on Zenodo (record 3254683, 161.6 MB) as 'Sample raw images from cryogenically cooled Large Field Camera chip 0 at Palomar Observatory' by Erik Tollerud and Matthew Craig. The dataset includes bias, dark, flat, and science frames. The CCDs are cryogenically cooled with liquid nitrogen. This is the primary Example 1 dataset used in the official Astropy CCD Data Reduction Guide for demonstrating CCD image calibration techniques.
